overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a rainy, neon-lit Night City. The character moves from a street food stall through downtown streets, under overpasses, and up to a plaza with vibrant holographic advertisements.

agents.ego_description: standing near a noodle shop stall then beginning to walk forward into the rainy street

entered.detail: brown canvas canopy over a street food vendor with warm interior lighting
pink neon sign with 'SPC' text mounted on a building
red and black vending machine with glowing display
large dark trash receptacle on the sidewalk
tall street light illuminating the rainy scene

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a covered food stall canopy in a rainy futuristic city. Neon signs glow in the distance while the player character begins walking forward past the vendor area.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated ramp descending to street intersection

events.description: descending concrete ramp from elevated walkway to street level
turning slightly right while continuing down the ramp toward the street

agents.ego_description: walking down a wet concrete ramp toward the street level while rain falls heavily

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving through the foggy intersection in the distance

entered.detail: sloped concrete walkway with metal railings descending to street level
traffic signal showing red light at the intersection
high-rise buildings with illuminated windows rising into the fog
metal safety railing along the edge of the ramp

segments.scene_description: The player descends a concrete ramp from the elevated area down to street level. The open street is visible ahead through heavy rain and fog, with a car's headlights cutting through the mist at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath highway overpass with directional signage

events.description: entering covered area beneath massive concrete highway overpass
passing under the overpass structure with large directional signs overhead

agents.ego_description: walking under the highway overpass while observing directional signs pointing to Westbrook and Japan Town

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure with metal support beams overhead
large black signs with white text indicating directions to Westbrook and Japan Town
large vertical billboard with pink 'TENGU' text and holographic advertisement

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive highway overpass, the scene becomes more enclosed. Directional signs for Westbrook and Japan Town hang overhead, while a large Tengu billboard glows pink on the left. A pedestrian walks toward the camera in the dimly lit underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk under building overhang with construction barriers

events.description: entering darker covered walkway with artificial fluorescent lighting
navigating past yellow and black construction barricades on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk next to the street, passing pedestrians and construction barriers

notable_agents.action: man in white tank top and patterned shorts walking toward the camera
person in blue jacket walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: concrete building overhang creating a covered walkway with fluorescent lights
yellow and black striped construction barriers blocking part of the walkway
modern building facade with reflective glass windows and metal panels

segments.scene_description: The player moves into a narrow covered sidewalk under a building overhang. The lighting becomes darker and more artificial. Yellow construction barricades line the path, and several pedestrians walk by, including a man in a white tank top approaching from the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza with stairs and vibrant neon advertisements

events.description: ascending wide concrete stairs to upper plaza level
entering area with intense pink and cyan neon lighting from surrounding advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking up stairs into an open plaza area with bright neon signs and people sitting on benches

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the steps using a handheld device

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading up to the elevated plaza
intense pink and purple neon lights illuminating the wall and stairs
open elevated plaza with benches and scattered pedestrians
large vertical advertisement for '13 COLA' with bright white lighting
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The player ascends concrete stairs into an elevated plaza bathed in vibrant pink and cyan neon light. The area opens up with people sitting on benches, graffiti-covered walls, and large holographic advertisements creating a cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy futuristic city, transitioning from a sheltered street stall into the depths of an urban underpass before emerging into a vibrant neon plaza. It begins under a covered food stall canopy, moving forward past vendors as the camera descends a concrete ramp into a rain-swept street where headlights cut through heavy fog. The scene then becomes more enclosed as the camera passes beneath a massive highway overpass flanked by glowing pink billboards and directional signs, before shifting into a narrow, dimly lit sidewalk lined with yellow construction barricades. Finally, the path leads up a set of concrete stairs, opening into an elevated plaza bathed in brilliant pink and cyan light with holographic advertisements and graffiti-covered walls.
